titleStmt.title: SII 25.151: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 151. (A.R. No. 151 of 1908.) MĀṈŪR, PALANI TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the Chōḷēśvara temple.
This inscription may be assigned to about the 14th Century on grounds of palaeography.

It records an order of the king granting 5 mā of lands along with its income from taxes in the village Vīrarājēndraśōḻanallūr as iṟaiyili, for providing food-offerings to the deity of the temple of Vīrarājēndrachōḷīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār in the above village included in Vaigāvūr-nāḍu.
The tāṉattār of the temple was to raise crops in the above lands and conduct the offerings to the deity with effect from the 14th+1st year.
The taxes specified are oṭṭuachchu, ugavai, ārāṭchi-kaḍamai, kāṇikkai, vāśalviniyōgam, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ vaikāvūr nāṭṭu ntira coḻanallūr Uṭaiyār virarājentira coḷiśvara muṭai
yār koyil tāṉattār Innāyaṉāṟkku Amutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum veñcaṉaṅkaḷukku Ivvūrilpatiṉālāvatu varaiyum kaṇakkil paṭṭa nilam niṅkala
nilattile Aiñcu mānilam Itaṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal tiruttip payirc ceytu koḷḷu maḷavil Innilattukku Iṟukkum Oṭṭu Accu Ārāṭci kaṭa
Elavai Ukavai kāṇikkai vācalviṉiyokam maṟṟum Eppeyarpaṭṭa varikaḷum Uṭpaṭa Innāḷ mutal Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom Ippaṭikku
lai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu candrādityavat celvatākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koṇṭu Aṉupavikka .
Digital edition of SII 25.151 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
